<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersMessage" 
                     xmlns:cns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersCommonTypes">
    <!-- Distribution Chain -->
    <DistributionChain>
        <cns:DistributionChainLink>
            <cns:Ordinal>1</cns:Ordinal>
            <cns:OrgRole>Seller</cns:OrgRole>
            <cns:ParticipatingOrg>
                <cns:Name>Travel Agency XYZ</cns:Name>
                <cns:OrgID>SELLER123</cns:OrgID>
            </cns:ParticipatingOrg>
        </cns:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>
    <!-- Payload Attributes -->
    <!-- optional -->
    <PayloadAttributes>
        <cns:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</cns:CorrelationID>
        <cns:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</cns:Timestamp>
        <cns:TrxID>TRX-123456789</cns:TrxID>
        <cns:VersionNumber>21.3</cns:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>
    <!-- Request -->
    <Request>
        <!-- Flight Request -->
        <cns:FlightRequest>
            <cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                <!-- KRP to CPH -->
                <cns:OriginDestCriteria>
                    <cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{arrivalDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                    <cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{departureDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                </cns:OriginDestCriteria>
            </cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
        </cns:FlightRequest>
        <!-- Passenger List -->
        <cns:PaxList>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX1</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>ADT</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX2</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>CHD</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX3</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>INF</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
        </cns:PaxList>
    </Request>
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

                    <cns:OriginDepCriteria>

                    </cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                </cns:OriginDestCriteria>
                <cns:OriginDestCriteria>
                    <cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{nextArrivalDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                    <cns:OriginDepCriteria>

        </cns:FlightRequest>
        
        <!-- Passenger List -->
        <cns:PaxList>

<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersMessage" 
                     xmlns:cns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersCommonTypes">
    
    <!-- Distribution Chain -->
    <DistributionChain>
        <cns:DistributionChainLink>
            <cns:Ordinal>1</cns:Ordinal>
            <cns:OrgRole>Seller</cns:OrgRole>
            <cns:ParticipatingOrg>
                <cns:Name>Travel Agency XYZ</cns:Name>
                <cns:OrgID>SELLER123</cns:OrgID>
            </cns:ParticipatingOrg>
        </cns:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>
    
    <!-- Payload Attributes -->
    <!-- optional -->
    <PayloadAttributes>
        <cns:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</cns:CorrelationID>
        <cns:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</cns:Timestamp>
        <cns:TrxID>TRX-123456789</cns:TrxID>
        <cns:VersionNumber>21.3</cns:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>

    <!-- Request -->
    <Request>
        <!-- Flight Request -->
        <cns:FlightRequest>
            <cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                <!-- KRP to CPH -->
                <cns:OriginDestCriteria>
                    <cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{arrivalDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                    <cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{departureDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                </cns:OriginDestCriteria>
            </cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
        </cns:FlightRequest>
        
        <!-- Passenger List -->
        <cns:PaxList>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX1</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>ADT</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX2</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>CHD</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX3</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>INF</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
        </cns:PaxList>
    </Request>
    
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>

            <ns2:Ordinal>1</ns2:Ordinal>
            <ns2:OrgRole>Seller</ns2:OrgRole>

                <ns2:OrgID>Seller123</ns2:OrgID>
            </ns2:ParticipatingOrg>
        </ns2:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>
    <PayloadAttributes>
        <ns2:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</ns2:CorrelationID>
        <ns2:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</ns2:Timestamp>
        <ns2:TrxID>TRX-123456789</ns2:TrxID>
        <ns2:VersionNumber>21.3</ns2:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>
    <Request>
        <ns2:OrderRefID>{{orderId}}</ns2:OrderRefID>
        <ns2:UpdateOrder>
            <ns2:ReshopOrder>
                <ns2:ReshopOrderChoice>
                    <ns2:ServiceOrder>
                        <ns2:AddOfferItems>
                            <ns2:FlightRequest>
                                <ns2:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                                    <ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                        <ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{rebookArrivalDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                            <!--
                                            <ns2:Time>12:30:00</ns2:Time>
                                            -->
                                        </ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                        <ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{rebookDepartureDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                            <!--
                                            <ns2:Time>14:30:00</ns2:Time>
                                            -->
                                        </ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                    </ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                </ns2:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                            </ns2:FlightRequest>
                        </ns2:AddOfferItems>
                        <ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                            <ns2:OrderItemRefID>{{orderItemId0}}</ns2:OrderItemRefID>
                        </ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                        <ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                            <ns2:OrderItemRefID>{{orderItemId1}}</ns2:OrderItemRefID>
                        </ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                        <ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                            <ns2:OrderItemRefID>{{orderItemId2}}</ns2:OrderItemRefID>
                        </ns2:DeleteOrderItem>
                    </ns2:ServiceOrder>
                </ns2:ReshopOrderChoice>
            </ns2:ReshopOrder>
        </ns2:UpdateOrder>
    </Request>
</IATA_OrderReshopRQ>

    <DistributionChain>
        <ns2:DistributionChainLink>
            <ns2:Ordinal>1</ns2:Ordinal>
            <ns2:OrgRole>Seller</ns2:OrgRole>
            <ns2:ParticipatingOrg>
                <ns2:Name>Travel Agency XYZ</ns2:Name>
                <ns2:OrgID>Seller123</ns2:OrgID>
            </ns2:ParticipatingOrg>
        </ns2:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>
    <PayloadAttributes>
        <ns2:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</ns2:CorrelationID>
        <ns2:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</ns2:Timestamp>
        <ns2:TrxID>TRX-123456789</ns2:TrxID>
        <ns2:VersionNumber>21.3</ns2:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>
    <Request>
        <ns2:OrderRefID>{{orderId}}</ns2:OrderRefID>
        <ns2:UpdateOrder>
            <ns2:ReshopOrder>
                <ns2:ReshopOrderChoice>
                    <ns2:ServiceOrder>
                        <ns2:AddOfferItems>
                            <ns2:FlightRequest>
                                <ns2:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                                    <ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                        <ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{rebookArrivalDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                            <!--
                                            <ns2:Time>12:30:00</ns2:Time>
                                            -->
                                        </ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                        <ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{rebookDepartureDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                            <!--
                                            <ns2:Time>14:30:00</ns2:Time>
                                            -->
                                        </ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                    </ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                    <ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                        <ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{nextRebookArrivalDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                        </ns2:DestArrivalCriteria>
                                        <ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                            <ns2:Date>{{nextRebookDepartureDate}}</ns2:Date>
                                            <ns2:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</ns2:IATA_LocationCode>
                                        </ns2:OriginDepCriteria>
                                    </ns2:OriginDestCriteria>
                                </ns2:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                            </ns2:FlightRequest>
                        </ns2:AddOfferItems>

        <cns:DistributionChainLink>
            <cns:Ordinal>1</cns:Ordinal>
            <cns:OrgRole>Seller</cns:OrgRole>
            <cns:ParticipatingOrg>
                <cns:Name>Travel Agency XYZ</cns:Name>
                <cns:OrgID>Seller123</cns:OrgID>
            </cns:ParticipatingOrg>
        </cns:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>

        <cns:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</cns:CorrelationID>
        <cns:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</cns:Timestamp>
        <cns:TrxID>TRX-123456789</cns:TrxID>
        <cns:VersionNumber>21.3</cns:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>
    <!-- Request -->
    <Request>
        <cns:ChangeOrderChoice>
            <cns:AcceptSelectedQuotedOfferList>
                <cns:SelectedPricedOffer>
                    <cns:OfferRefID>{{reshopOfferId}}</cns:OfferRefID>
                    <cns:OwnerCode>VS</cns:OwnerCode>

                </cns:SelectedPricedOffer>
            </cns:AcceptSelectedQuotedOfferList>
        </cns:ChangeOrderChoice>
        <cns:Order>
            <cns:OrderID>{{orderId}}</cns:OrderID>
            <cns:OwnerCode>VS</cns:OwnerCode>
        </cns:Order>
    </Request>
</IATA_OrderChangeRQ>

<IATA_AirShoppingRQ xmlns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersMessage" 
                     xmlns:cns="http://www.iata.org/IATA/2015/EASD/00/IATA_OffersAndOrdersCommonTypes">
    
    <!-- Distribution Chain -->
    <DistributionChain>
        <cns:DistributionChainLink>
            <cns:Ordinal>1</cns:Ordinal>
            <cns:OrgRole>Seller</cns:OrgRole>
            <cns:ParticipatingOrg>
                <cns:Name>Travel Agency XYZ</cns:Name>
                <cns:OrgID>SELLER123</cns:OrgID>
            </cns:ParticipatingOrg>
        </cns:DistributionChainLink>
    </DistributionChain>
    
    <!-- Payload Attributes -->
    <!-- optional -->
    <PayloadAttributes>
        <cns:CorrelationID>{{$randomUUID}}</cns:CorrelationID>
        <cns:Timestamp>{{today_th}}</cns:Timestamp>
        <cns:TrxID>TRX-123456789</cns:TrxID>
        <cns:VersionNumber>21.3</cns:VersionNumber>
    </PayloadAttributes>

    <!-- Request -->
    <Request>
        <!-- Flight Request -->
        <cns:FlightRequest>
            <cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
                <!-- KRP to CPH -->
                <cns:OriginDestCriteria>
                    <cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{arrivalDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{arrivalCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:DestArrivalCriteria>
                    <cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                        <cns:Date>{{departureDate}}</cns:Date>
                        <cns:IATA_LocationCode>{{departureCode}}</cns:IATA_LocationCode>
                    </cns:OriginDepCriteria>
                </cns:OriginDestCriteria>
            </cns:FlightRequestOriginDestinationsCriteria>
        </cns:FlightRequest>
        
        <!-- Passenger List -->
        <cns:PaxList>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX1</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>ADT</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX2</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>CHD</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
            <cns:Pax>
                <cns:PaxID>PAX3</cns:PaxID>
                <cns:PTC>INF</cns:PTC>
            </cns:Pax>
        </cns:PaxList>
    </Request>
    
</IATA_AirShoppingRQ>
